sub_modules.aes128_input_gate: Combinational launch qualifier for start, valid_in, and decryption mode.
sub_modules.aes128_key_expand: Combinational AES-128 forward key expansion producing all 11 round keys for reverse decryption use.
sub_modules.aes128_decrypt_core: Combinational AES-128 block decrypt datapath implementing inverse rounds, inverse S-box, inverse shift rows, add round key, and inverse mix columns.
